v0.1.2.description:
Uses [Version 0.1.1 of GMAP](https://github.com/ChrisCj8/gm_ap/releases/tag/v0.1.1)

- adopted a new versioning scheme
- gmod path is now set in a text file separate from host.yaml since accessing that during datapackage creation is too unreliable
    - if the path was set in host.yaml beforehand it will be migrated automatically for now
- edit mode tools will now stop you from creating locations, exits, entrances and start point with invalid settings
- added movement values from Half-Life: Source to the editor presets
- users are now prevented from saving over built-in configs unless the convar `apadventure_editor_allow_static_overwrite` is set to 1 to prevent people from accidentally overwriting stuff they shouldn't
- issues encountered by the apworld when processing configs will now be logged into a file in the gmod_apadv folder
- starts and entrances now have player-sized bounding boxes drawn around them in edit mode
- fixed the start tool not creating toolgun effects when used
- fixed a bunch of ui files not being addcsluafile'd
- made some minor changes to the documentation

if you don't know what the .fgd file is for you don't need it
v0.1.2.title: Version 0.1.2
